gates.title: Memory architecture wave is covered by the runtime memory benchmark
evidence_required: No benchmark case failures are present

gates.title: Pre-answer continuity paths stay fast and evidence-backed
evidence_required: Semantic layers read paths do not mutate schema in hot answer flows
Transcript fallback is bounded and avoids heavy indexing before a response

gates.title: User-facing and exportable memory surfaces redact private payloads
evidence_required: Session portability redacts raw context and body payloads
Transcript, KG, memory export, entity, and failure-prevention surfaces avoid raw private values

gates.title: Fresh installs bootstrap the v76 schema with semantic layer support
evidence_required: A clean runtime reaches schema version 76
semantic_layers data is available after bootstrap
No legacy database state is required

gates.title: Existing installs update from schema 75 to 76 without losing user continuity
evidence_required: Update path migrates from schema 75 to 76
Existing session and diary data are preserved
semantic_layers data is created or preserved after update

gates.title: Public release surfaces and integration artifacts are aligned for v7.28.0
evidence_required: README, llms, homepage, blog index, blog post, changelog page, and sitemap reference v7.28.0
Claude plugin, ClawHub skill, and OpenClaw package metadata reference 7.28.0
Release smoke and readiness checks validate the v7.28.0 contract before tag publish
